name: Olive Garden Capellini Primavera (Light)
recipeIngredient: 5 cups broccoli florets, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 1/4 cups yellow squash, halved lengthwise and thinly sliced
9 sun-dried tomato halves, not oil-packed, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick saucepan, heat olive oil and butter over medium-high heat for 30 seconds.
Add broccoli, onions, and carrots, and sauté until the carrots are tender, about 5 minutes.
2. Add mushrooms, squash, and garlic; sauté for an additional 2 minutes.
3. Stir in 1 1/2 cups water and the remaining ingredients (tomatoes through crushed red pepper flakes).
Cook, stirring until just below boiling point.
4. Lower the heat, cover, and simmer until the vegetables are tender, about 8-10 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling water until tender, about 6-8 minutes.
Drain and transfer to a serving bowl.
6. Toss the pasta with the sauce and sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
Serving (2 cups) provides: 1/2 fat, 5 vegetables, 6 carbs per serving. 286 calories, 13 gm protein; 51 gm carbohydrates; 5 gm fat; 88 mg sodium; 8 gm fiber.
Source: Weight Watchers Magazine, December 1994
